pi_items.source: Task description Section 5: 'Save the file as "/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/staircase_plan.dxf"'
Task description Section 2: 'Draw a 10-tread staircase starting at origin (0,0).'

Task description Section 2: 'You need 11 horizontal lines in total (from Y=0 to Y=2500 in 250mm increments)' - Verified by calculation: Y=[0,250,500,750,1000,1250,1500,1750,2000,2250,2500] = 11 points
Task description Section 2: 'Tread depth (going): 250 mm' and 'from Y=0 to Y=2500 in 250mm increments' - Verified: 10 treads × 250 mm/tread = 2500 mm
Task description Section 2: 'Tread depth (going): 250 mm.' and 'from Y=0 to Y=2500 in 250mm increments'

Task description Section 3: 'Number the risers "1" through "10" centered on each tread.' and 'Add text "UP" and a direction arrow pointing in the +Y direction' - Metadata lists only key examples; task requires all riser numbers 1-10 plus UP text

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CAD drawing task with no external data source. The agent creates a staircase plan-view drawing in LibreCAD from scratch based on geometric specifications: 10 treads with 250mm spacing (total run 2500mm), 900mm width, 11 horizontal lines spanning the full tread area, labeled on three layers (Treads, Labels, Dimensions). All geometry is internally consistent and mathematically correct. Text elements required are riser numbers 1-10 and an 'UP' indicator. Output saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/staircase_plan.dxf.
